title: Sunny Pack - Sun & Moon
description: More detailed versions of the moon and sun, made in the form of three-dimensional cubes.
body:
Replaces the standard sun and moon with more detailed versions made in the form of three-dimensional cubes rather than flat squares (although it is still an image on a plane). 
It should not conflict with anything, as it only replaces the images of the moon and sun phases.

There are similar sun and moon for the PureSuffering-1.20.1-1.6.8.5R-LTS1 mod
